'll1'<I 'fflf ti!: 'f; 3@:, 3lil, ? lRlf;R, lif>1&i1'1ft ?. 1968 ( I 968 1fiT 46) 'h't 1i1R1 36 i;Rr ? ? 1fiT WWI ? ti!:,? 4>1&il'lftont -u '!Ulm? <t ? <f>l&ii'lft flrilil. 1911 1fiT aft. ffllT'I ? -it ? r?... ?llia flrilil 1l'IRftt, 3llffil:- -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PARTII-SEC. 3(i)l MINIS'IRY OF AGRICULTIJRE (Department of Agriculture and Co-operation) N<YfIF[CATION New Delhi, the 26th February, 2009 G.S.R. 128(E).-Whereas the draft rule to further amend the Insecticides Rules, 1971 which the Central Govenunent proposes to make in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 36 of the Insecticides Act, 1968 (46 of 1968) in consultation with the Central Insecticides Board, was published under the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Agriculture (Department of Agriculture and Cooperation) vide G .S.R. 798(E), dated the 19th November, 2008 in the Gazette of'India, Extraordinary Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i). dated 19th November, 2008, inviting objections or suggestions from all persons likely to be affected thereby, before the expiry of the period of forty-five days from the date on which the copies of the Gazette containing the said notification were made to the public; And whereas, copies of the said Gazette notification were made available to the public on the 24th November, 2008; And whereas, no objection or suggestion was received from the public in respect of the said notification; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 36 of the Insecticides Act, 1968 (46 of! 968), the Central Government, after consultation with the Central Insecticides Board, hereby makes the following rules, further to amend the Insecticides Rules, 1971, namely:- 1. (I) This rule may be called the Insecticides (Amendment) Rules, 2009. (2) This shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In rule 45 of the Insecticides Rules, 1971 for the words "Chennai, Kandla, Kochi, Kolkata, Mumbai and Tuticorin (Ennor)-in respect of insecticides imported by sea into India", the words "Chennai, Kandla, Kochi, Kolkata, Mormugao, Mumbai and Tuticorin (Ennor)-in respect of insecticides imported by sea into India" shall be substituted. [F. No. 19-7/2006-PP. IJ PANKAJKUMAR, Jt. Secy. Note: The Principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, vide No.G.S.R. 1650, dated 19th October, 1971 and subsequently amended vide :- (!) G.S.R.474(E),dated24thJuly, 1976, (2) G.S.R. 736(E),dated9thDecember, 1977, (3) G.S.R.1064(E),daled7thNovember, 1988, (4) G.S.R. 533(E), dated 6th August, 1993, (5) G.S.R.37l(E),dated20thMay, 1999, (6) G.S.R.372(E),dated20thMay, 1999, (1) G.S.R. 548(E), dated 12th September, 2006 and (8) G.S.R. 692(E), dated 7th November, 2006.
